title: Silicone Oven Mitts for Air Fryer, 1 Pair Thicken Mini Oven Gloves Heat Resistant for BBQ,Cooking,Baking
seller_info_text: Fuyang Yabei Jian Trading Co., Ltd.
features: High Temperature Resistant: Our oven gloves double are thickened and anti-scald, which can help you take out the hot baking pan of the oven, air fryer, protect your hands from being burned, and enjoy the fun of cooking. One thing to note is that it can only cover your fingers. It's suitable for small hand. Please use ninja silicone mitts mittscarefully to avoid scalding your hands.

High Quality: Our oven gloves are made of silicone material, durable, not easy to tear, heat resistant up to temperatures of 446 degrees Fahrenheit to help protect fingers, can be used by left or right hands, very suitable for you to use for baking.
Perfect Fit on Fingers：The two fingers of oven glove allow you to grip and pinch oven food more easily and also avoid the lack of hand dexterity that can be a problem when using traditional gloves.
Non-Slip Design：The opening of this mini oven glove has a streak design, which has anti-slip function and can help you hold the baking pan and pan steadily.
Easy to Clean: The silicone oven mitts are very easy to clean, you just need to wash them with warm water and soap, then dry them. Also dishwasher safe.
description: Product Description Color：Dark Gray Quantity：1 Pair Thickened Oven Gloves Temperature range：Resist a high temperature up to 446℉ (230℃) Non-slip/Soft and Durable Silicone gloves are designed with anti-slip stripes and you can handle slippery items firmly. Convenient Storage Silicone oven glove can be hung up anywhere in your kitchen without taking up much space Easy to Clean Silicone oven mitts are easy to get clean by hand-washing or machine-washing. High temperature resistance silicone mitts are made of heat resistant silicone and are perfect for handling hot plates and pans. Widely Applicable Silicone gloves are used in cooking, barbecue, microwave oven and other scenes Note：This oven mitt only partially covers the fingers and does not completely cover the palm. Please use it with caution and do not let your hands touch any parts that are too hot or too cold to prevent burns or frostbite.
